items.title: NAACP sues xAI over data center pollution
items.summary: The NAACP is suing xAI and a subsidiary called MZX Tech for allegedly operating unpermitted methane gas turbines to power its Colossus 2 data center in South Memphis. The associ...

items.title: AI datacenter startup Fluidstack in talks for $1B round at $18B valuation months after hitting $7.5B, says report
